description_long: This is a classic, full-length rifle with a wooden stock and forearm, featuring a dark metal barrel and receiver. The stock is robust and fixed, extending smoothly into the shoulder rest, while the forearm is rounded and ergonomically shaped for grip. The barrel is long and slender, with a front sight post and a rear iron sight mounted on the receiver. The trigger guard and magazine area are visible, with the magazine appearing to be internal and flush with the bottom of the rifle. The finish of the wood is matte with a rich brown hue, contrasting with the matte black metal components. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military rifles, built for durability and reliability.
description: A classic wooden-stock rifle with a long black barrel, iron sights, and a fixed internal magazine. The design features a matte brown wood finish and dark metal components.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the entire length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, iron sights, and trigger area.
description_view_2: Viewed from the buttstock end, the rifle appears as a narrow vertical line, with the stock and barrel aligned.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the wooden stock, barrel, and iron sights clearly visible.
